channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Challenges of Verifying Real and Synthetic Content Online
item.description: The article explores how the rise of synthetic media and generative AI is overwhelming traditional methods of verification online. From AI-generated images to restricted access to satellite imagery, v...

item.title: Finance Minister Aurangzeb Travels to US for IMF and World Bank Spring Meetings 2026
item.description: Finance Minister Muhammad Aurangzeb has departed for the United States to attend the IMF and World Bank Spring Meetings 2026, scheduled from April 13 to 18 in Washington, DC. During this visit, he is ...

item.title: Arsenal host Bournemouth in Premier League as Mikel Arteta's side seek to extend lead at the top of the table
item.description: Arsenal welcomed Bournemouth to the Emirates Stadium in a crucial Premier League fixture on 11 April 2026, with the Gunners aiming to strengthen their position at the summit of the table. Sitting nine...

item.title: PMA Talang Dangal Class of 2026 Cadets Conduct Outreach and Exposure Visit to Pag-Asa Island
item.description: A fresh batch of graduating cadets from the Philippine Military Academy (PMA) 'Talang Dangal' Class of 2026 visited Pag-Asa Island in Palawan on April 6, 2026, for an outreach program and exposure tri...

item.title: Family of late Lieutenant Jude Ude calls for full investigation into his stabbing death at Katsina barracks
item.description: The family of late Lieutenant Jude Osondu Ude don dey demand proper justice from the Nigerian Army top hierarchy over the tragic death of the young officer wey dem stab for inside 17 Garrison Brigade ...

item.title: Rivers Monarch Calls on Residents to Promote Peace and Avoid Crime
item.description: His Majesty, King Leslie N. Eke, the traditional ruler of Evo Kingdom, don use recent media briefing for him palace for Woji Community to beg residents of Rivers State make dem avoid crime and dey liv...

item.title: Discovery of a Meteor Shower Caused by an Asteroid Fragmenting Near the Sun
item.description: Researchers studying meteors have discovered a previously unknown meteor shower originating from an asteroid being broken down by solar heat. Using millions of observations from all-sky camera network...

item.title: Pakistan Mediates Crucial US-Iran Peace Talks in Islamabad
item.description: The editorial titled 'High Hopes', published in Dawn on April 11, 2026, focuses on Pakistan’s central role in mediating peace talks between the United States and Iran. After successfully brokering a t...

item.title: Baringo Community Praises Local Man for Helping Hundreds of Women Give Birth Safely
item.description: In Baringo county, Robert Aule, a 62-year-old man from Tiati, has become a pillar in maternal care, stepping into a field mostly dominated by women. Despite having no formal medical training, he has a...

item.title: How organised violence is shaping Kenya’s local politics and economy
item.description: The article takes a deep look at how violence has become a business and political tool in Kenya. It explains that organised groups, sometimes called 'goons', are hired by political leaders, land carte...

item.title: Anil Kapoor’s Television Series ‘24’ to Stream Online Soon
item.description: Bollywood actor Anil Kapoor’s television adaptation of the hit American series ‘24’ is now scheduled to make its digital debut on an OTT platform. The acclaimed series, which originally aired on India...

item.title: Saskatchewan Court of Appeal maintains stay on impaired driving charge in 9-year-old’s death due to trial delays
item.description: The Saskatchewan Court of Appeal has upheld a decision to stay the impaired driving causing death charge against Taylor Kennedy, following the tragic death of nine-year-old Baeleigh Maurice. Maurice w...

item.title: A curated guide to 25 essential books from childhood to early adulthood
item.description: Reading among children and young people has declined sharply in recent decades, with fewer than a fifth reading daily for pleasure. This article presents a list of 25 recommended books to read from bi...

item.title: PM Shehbaz Sharif holds meeting with US Vice President JD Vance ahead of US-Iran talks in Islamabad
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif met with United States Vice President JD Vance on Saturday in Islamabad. The meeting took place after Vance and his delegation arrived in Pakistan for historic direct tal...

item.title: La Salle continues unbeaten run with dominant win over Ateneo in UAAP Season 88
item.description: The De La Salle Lady Spikers extended their dominance in the UAAP Season 88 women’s volleyball tournament by cruising past the Ateneo Blue Eagles in straight sets. The match, held on April 11, 2026, w...

item.title: Arsenal host Bournemouth as injured players return ahead of crucial Premier League title run-in
item.description: Arsenal resume their Premier League campaign against Bournemouth aiming to extend their lead at the top of the table to twelve points before Manchester City play Chelsea. Under Mikel Arteta, the Gunne...

item.title: South African fighters impress as PFL Africa Season Two begins in Pretoria
item.description: PFL Africa Season Two launched in Pretoria with an energetic display of South African MMA talent, solidifying the country's role as a key host for international mixed martial arts events. At Time Squa...

item.title: Canadian food banks face rising costs and growing demand for assistance
item.description: Food banks across Canada are struggling to meet increasing demand as rising fuel prices eat into their already tight budgets. Many organizations report that a greater share of their operating funds no...

item.title: Aerobic Gymnastics Now Part of NCAA Season 101 Sports Lineup
item.description: The National Collegiate Athletic Association (NCAA) in the Philippines has announced that aerobic gymnastics will officially be part of its Season 101 sports calendar, marking an expansion of its athl...

item.title: Borno Governor Zulum Gives ₦50 Million Support To Family Of Slain Army Officer Lt. Col. OC Okolo
item.description: Borno State Governor, Professor Babagana Umara Zulum, don show strong support to di family of one gallant Nigerian Army officer wey Boko Haram kill. Di governor send ₦50 million to di family of Late L...
